title: Bradford Protein Concentration Determination
author: Brian Baltzar
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.girbud6

steps.title: Dilute BSA using the following table
steps.instruction: Dilute BSA using the following table. %s %s

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.4 mL diluted Bradford (BioRad) Protein assay mix to each of the diluted BSA samples

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.4 mL diluted Bradford (BioRad) Protein assay mix to tubes containing 30µl of the protein of interest.

steps.title: Incubate for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate for 30 min. at room temperature (Leave no longer than one hour)

steps.title: Plot the OD of the BSA...
steps.instruction: Plot the OD of the BSA protein standards (Concentrations at X and OD at Y)

steps.title: Calculate the concentration of the protein of interest
steps.instruction: Calculate the concentration of the protein of interest.
